zh-CN.title: Schema 映射
zh-CN.requirement: 将每个资产文件映射到后端 content-pack compiler 可识别的字段。
zh-CN.acceptance: 后端 schema、compiler、fixture、contract test 通过后才可生产使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是导入契约，不是运行时代码。

en.title: Map every asset file into backend content-pack compiler fields before production
en.requirement: Map every asset file into backend content-pack compiler fields before production.
en.acceptance: Backend schema, compiler, fixtures, and contract tests must pass before production use.
en.do_not_overread: This is an import contract, not runtime code.

zh-CN.title: Canonical fixtures
zh-CN.requirement: 为 balanced、high_empathy_low_recovery、low_confidence 三条路径生成 zh-CN / en canonical fixtures。
zh-CN.acceptance: 后端 schema、compiler、fixture、contract test 通过后才可生产使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是导入契约，不是运行时代码。

en.title: Generate zh-CN/en fixtures for balanced, high empathy low recovery, and low confidence paths
en.requirement: Generate zh-CN/en fixtures for balanced, high empathy low recovery, and low confidence paths.
en.acceptance: Backend schema, compiler, fixtures, and contract tests must pass before production use.
en.do_not_overread: This is an import contract, not runtime code.

zh-CN.title: 契约测试
zh-CN.requirement: 断言 report payload 包含 v1.6 assets、免费转化动作、无权限门槛，且 SJT 保持 unavailable。
zh-CN.acceptance: 后端 schema、compiler、fixture、contract test 通过后才可生产使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是导入契约，不是运行时代码。

en.title: Assert report payload contains v1
en.requirement: Assert report payload contains v1.6 assets, conversion actions, no access wall, and SJT unavailable.
en.acceptance: Backend schema, compiler, fixtures, and contract tests must pass before production use.
en.do_not_overread: This is an import contract, not runtime code.

zh-CN.title: 前端消费契约
zh-CN.requirement: 前端必须渲染后端 resolved assets，不得硬编码正式报告解释文案。
zh-CN.acceptance: 后端 schema、compiler、fixture、contract test 通过后才可生产使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是导入契约，不是运行时代码。

en.title: Frontend must render resolved assets and must not hardcode official report explanation
en.requirement: Frontend must render resolved assets and must not hardcode official report explanation.
en.acceptance: Backend schema, compiler, fixtures, and contract tests must pass before production use.
en.do_not_overread: This is an import contract, not runtime code.

zh-CN.title: Agent 就绪契约
zh-CN.requirement: Agent 在检索、拒答和边界评测通过前，只能解释已解析报告资产。
zh-CN.acceptance: 后端 schema、compiler、fixture、contract test 通过后才可生产使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是导入契约，不是运行时代码。

en.title: Agent can only explain resolved assets until retrieval and refusal evals pass
en.requirement: Agent can only explain resolved assets until retrieval and refusal evals pass.
en.acceptance: Backend schema, compiler, fixtures, and contract tests must pass before production use.
en.do_not_overread: This is an import contract, not runtime code.
